headline: I Bought 50 Undervalued Stocks In 2019 And 2020: Here's How They Performed

headline: ExchangeRight Announces Full Subscription of $41.9 Million Net-Leased All-Cash 17 DST
summary: PASADENA, Calif., April 28, 2026--Net-Leased All-Cash 17 DST has been fully subscribed, adding to the growing acquisition pipeline for ExchangeRight’s Essential Income REIT.

headline: Dollar Tree Hits 5-Month Lows: Why Analysts Still See 27% Upside
summary: Dollar Tree (NASDAQ: DLTR) currently trades near $98, while the average Wall Street price target stands at $124.74, leaving over 27% of implied upside between today’s price and the consensus. Dollar Tree is the pure-play discount banner that emerged after the Family Dollar divestiture closed in July 2025. Wall Street has been watching the multi-price ... Dollar Tree Hits 5-Month Lows: Why Analysts Still See 27% Upside
